title: senecio stirthii
intro: Senecio stiriacus, also known as Groundsel, is a flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Senecio stirthii are attributed to its pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Groundsel include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Groundsel is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be found in some herbal supplements and topical creams.
